components.buttons: bg-white text-black hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors duration-300 rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-medium
components.cards: bg-[#141414] border border-white/10 rounded-none p-6 shadow-sm
components.inputs: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white placeholder:text-gray-500 rounded-none focus:border-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white
components.navigation: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10

effects.watermark_canvas: Overlay diagonal text 'Lux Studio' with opacity 0.3 on HTML canvas. Add progressive blur on bottom 50% using mask-image gradient.
effects.protection: Disable context menu (onContextMenu={(e) => e.preventDefault()}) and pointer-events-none on image elements.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind for styling. Initialize the app as a Vite React project with Tailwind CSS.
Do NOT use HTML input[type=date] or select. Use Shadcn UI components for Admin areas.

For the public photo viewer, images MUST be drawn onto an HTML5 <canvas>. The canvas should apply the watermark text ('Lux Studio') diagonally with low opacity, and a CSS mask-image linear-gradient or Canvas filter to progressively blur the bottom 50%.
Disable right-click via onContextMenu={e => e.preventDefault()} and disable drag via onDragStart={e => e.preventDefault()}.
For icons, install and use @phosphor-icons/react or lucide-react.
Follow the strict font combination: Cormorant Garamond for headings, Outfit for body text.
Use dark theme by default, apply bg-[#0A0A0A] and text-white globally.
Admin authentication should use Emergent-managed Google OAuth as requested.
Cloudinary must be used for image storage as per user choices.
Ensure the layout is highly spaced with p-8 to p-16 padding blocks to achieve a luxury feel.
Make sure all interactive and key informational elements include a 'data-testid' attribute.
Use solid rectangular cards (rounded-none) with 1px border for event display to mimic physical photograph frames.
Use 'bento' asymmetrical grid layouts for the public photography gallery.
